name: Luck Blade
description: You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While the weapon is on your person, you also gain a +1 bonus to saving throws.

luck.effect: Reroll failed D20 Test; must use second roll
luck.reuse_duration: Can't be used again until next dawn

wish.reuse_duration: Can't be used again until next dawn
wish.exhaustion: Weapon loses this property if it has no charges
